_comment: Add the contents of the 'command' key to your ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json to register slash commands globally.

runes.template: Manage Runes compression mode. If the user provided an argument after /runes, that is the mode (lite, full, ultra, or off/normal). If no argument given and Runes is currently off, activate full mode. If Runes is currently on, deactivate it. Use the rune_activate tool to make the change, then confirm with the status badge.

runes-help.description: Show Runes documentation: modes, commands, MetaGlyph symbols, examples
runes-help.template: Call the rune_help tool and display its output exactly as returned.

runes-stats.description: Show real token usage stats and estimated savings from Runes
runes-stats.template: Call the rune_stats tool with scope='alltime' and display the output exactly as returned.
